description_long: This structure is a modern solar energy infrastructure installation, featuring a large rectangular building with a flat roof predominantly covered by blue solar panels. The building's facade is finished in a smooth, light gray concrete, with the name 'Raltec' prominently displayed in blue and orange lettering. The front of the building includes a distinctive entrance with brick columns, white horizontal slats, and some landscaping elements such as small plants. The roof area is divided into two sections: a main section densely packed with solar panels and a secondary, smaller section with a single panel and a utility hatch. The overall design is utilitarian yet contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on maximizing solar collection. The structure appears robust and is likely intended for urban or industrial use, serving as both a power generation facility and a functional building.
description: A large, rectangular concrete building with a flat roof covered by blue solar panels and a modern facade labeled 'Raltec'. The structure features a prominent entrance with brick columns and white slats, and is designed for solar energy generation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'Raltec' logo, the main solar panel array on the roof, and the brick-accented entrance on the left.
description_view_1: Rear-angled view highlighting the secondary roof section with a single solar panel and utility hatch, and the full length of the main solar array.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the 'Raltec' logo and a clear view of the extensive solar panel coverage on the roof.
description_view_3: Front-angled view focusing on the main entrance with brick columns, white slats, and landscaping, as well as the solar panels above.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 10-15 degrees, facing upward and slightly toward the longer side of the building, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: roof-mounted, integrated into the building's flat roof with visible support frames likely made of aluminum or steel
attribute_array_configuration: single large array in a grid configuration, approximately 4x10 panels covering the main roof section
